name: Vitamin D Research
description: Vitamin D3 regimen (Batch protocol). Emerging research area with strong community anecdotal support but limited clinical trial data so far.

all_trials.title: High Dose Vitamin D Plus Multivitamin in the Prevention of Cluster Headache
all_trials.sponsor: The University of Texas Health Science Center, Houston
all_trials.what_tested: High-dose Vitamin D3 plus a multivitamin versus placebo for preventing cluster headache attacks.
all_trials.key_result: Terminated after enrolling 27 of the planned participants. No results posted. The study ran from 2021 to 2024.
all_trials.patient_relevance: Despite strong community interest in Vitamin D for CH, this rigorous trial was terminated early -- we still lack solid evidence on whether high-dose D3 prevents attacks.
all_trials.dose_tested: High-dose Vitamin D3 + multivitamin (specific dose not stated)
